mapper.select: select code, name from one_line_strategy_category order by sort_order asc

select count(*) from one_line_strategy where
and category = #{category}
mapper.insert: insert into one_line_strategy(category, content, writer, member_id, guest_password, reg_date, recommend_count) values(#{category}, #{content}, #{writer}, #{memberId}, #{guestPassword}, now(), 0)
